name: "Incident report"

<!--
Adding the `incident` label (applied automatically by this template) triggers
the incident-response workflow. An agent will perform root-cause analysis, add a
regression test, and open a fix PR. The more of the stack trace you paste, the
better it can localize the bug.
-->


## How to reproduce
<!-- Steps, input, or the user action that triggered it. -->

## Impact / severity
<!-- Who/what is affected and how badly. -->
